name: ExtensionMedicinalProductDefinition_PediatricUseIndicator
title: R5: If authorised for use in children (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `MedicinalProductDefinition.pediatricUseIndicator` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`MedicinalProductDefinition.pediatricUseIndicator` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `MedicinalProductDefinition.pediatricUseIndicator` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`
*  R4B: `MedicinalProductDefinition.pediatricUseIndicator` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `MedicinalProductDefinition.pediatricUseIndicator` has a context of MedicinalProduct based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `MedicinalProduct`.
Element `MedicinalProductDefinition.pediatricUseIndicator` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: If authorised for use in children
element.definition: If authorised for use in children, or infants, neonates etc.

binding.description: Suitability for age groups, in particular children.
